visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young woman with dark hair in pigtails, wearing a denim jacket and a white dress, waving at the camera in front of a large white 'Hej!' sign inside a brightly lit wooden-walled building. (2) The scene transitions to an outdoor event space with yellow and pink banners for 'Democratic Design Days 2025', where many people are walking around; the woman runs toward the camera. (3) She is seen playing ping pong on a purple table outdoors, followed by close-ups of various food items like pickled vegetables in jars and a person preparing kimchi. (4) The woman eats a slice of pepperoni pizza and drinks from a pink can while sitting in an outdoor cafe setting. (5) A montage follows showing her jumping into a large pit filled with blue plastic balls, lying in a white hammock outdoors, and walking through the IKEA Museum, which features historical furniture displays and vintage technology like a beige desktop computer. (6) She visits a 'Test Lab' where a yellow robotic arm repeatedly presses down on a gray sofa to test its durability. (7) The footage shifts to a grassy field where groups of people in traditional Swedish folk costumes are dancing in circles around a decorated pole. (8) The woman and a man (Chu Chu Shoe) are seen wearing hand-woven flower crowns and participating in the dancing and celebrations under a bright blue sky. (9) The day ends with an evening banquet inside a large rustic barn-like structure filled with people sitting at long tables under paper lanterns, where the woman talks to her companion.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: Hej! 我在IKEA總部. (2) [Slogan]: 到達活動主會場! 有新品、展覽，甚至還有瑞典演唱會!. (3) [Slogan]: 快跟著我一起. (4) [Slogan]: 瑞典宜家設計盛典 大眾化設計日2025. (5) [Slogan]: IKEA 提倡零剩食 分享果皮與料如何再料理 減少食物浪費. (6) [Slogan]: 各種美食. (7) [Slogan]: IKEA Museum 參觀全球唯一的. (8) [Slogan]: 分成4層樓展出 可以看到各年代的居家空間 現在看還是很時髦 顏色繽紛有美感. (9) [Slogan]: IKEA 農村體驗 體驗早期瑞典人生活 搬動大石頭開墾 (成就巨大的價值觀). (10) [Slogan]: 什麼意思. (11) [Slogan]: 博物館展示了各個年代的家具與居家生活 台灣的地獄廚房. (12) [Slogan]: 當地創意菜色 超多汁! 我切的真好. (13) [Slogan]: 產品測試線 IKEA Test Lab 家具都需要經過好幾萬次的模擬測試，確保品質. (14) [Variety]: (一次就成功). [Variety]: (失敗). (15) [Slogan]: Democratic Design Days 2025. (16) [Slogan]: 仲夏節是瑞典非常重要的傳統節日之一. (17) [Slogan]: 所以IKEA特別安排了仲夏夜之晚宴. (18) [Variety]: (古老瑞典民謠). (19) [Logo]: Dress Code 鄉村風. (20) [Logo]: Älmhult郊區. (21) [Variety]: 天氣超好. (22) [Variety]: 哞. [Variety]: 哈哈哈. (23) [Slogan]: 仲夏節必備 手編鮮花環. (24) [Variety]: (懶) 我想要有現成的. (25) [Variety]: (夏日仙子誕生). (26) [Slogan]: 瑞典魔鞋啾啾. (27) [Variety]: (好難喔). (28) [Slogan]: 仲夏節傳統舞蹈. (29) [Slogan]: 喝調酒 除了調酒 還有美食. (30) [Slogan]: 超長一條蛋糕 當地廚師精心準備的傳統盛宴. [Slogan]: 滿桌的美食. (31) [Logo]: 現在 9:04 (台灣時間凌晨 3 點).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 male secondary creator (啾啾鞋), and numerous event attendees, museum visitors, and traditional dancers.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, often in pigtails or braids, wearing a white dress paired with a light blue oversized denim jacket. A young Asian man wearing glasses and a tan button-up shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Interiors of IKEA headquarters with wooden panels and 'Hej!' signs; outdoor festival grounds with colorful banners and temporary structures; the IKEA Museum with staged living rooms from different decades; a testing lab with machinery; and a lush green field for traditional celebrations.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female Chinese narration begins over an upbeat electronic pop track with a strong 4/4 beat. A sharp 'whoosh' transition sound occurs as the scene changes. (2) Sound of a ping-pong ball bouncing rhythmically on a table. The narrator's tone is excited. (3) A sequence of eating sounds: a crisp crunch of pizza and a 'pop' and 'fizz' from a soda can opening. (4) A heavy muffled 'thud' as someone jumps into a ball pit, followed by the clattering of plastic balls. (5) In the museum, a wooden grinding and rhythmic scraping sound is heard as the woman churns butter. (6) A technical shift occurs with the sound of a robotic arm: a repetitive whirring motor sound and a pneumatic hiss each time it hits the sofa. (7) Music shifts to traditional Swedish folk music with high-pitched fiddle/violin melodies and rhythmic hand clapping from a crowd. (8) A clear 'Moo' sound from a cow is heard, followed by laughter from the narrator. (9) Indoor banquet hall ambience with the clinking of metal cutlery on ceramic plates and the low murmur of many voices talking in an enclosed space. The music lowers slightly as the two main speakers have a casual conversation.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Introduction -> Exhibition Highlights -> Cultural Experience -> Social Banquet
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document and showcase the experience of attending the IKEA Democratic Design Days 2025 and the traditional Midsummer festival in Sweden, highlighting product innovations, company history, and local cultural traditions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is centered entirely on IKEA headquarters, the IKEA Museum, and company-sponsored events, featuring multiple brand logos and positive commentary on products.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly produced travel vlog with rapid-fire editing and extensive text overlays typical of modern social media content. It successfully balances brand promotion with cultural tourism.
